spec.doc: Parcel Post and Express Post - Label & Barcode Specification v1.4

rules.title: AI 00 SSCC decoded
rules.description: The linear barcode must contain FNC1 + AI 00 + the 20-digit SSCC and nothing else.

messages.fail: SSCC assessment was selected, but no valid AI 00 SSCC barcode was decoded.

rules.title: SSCC check digit
rules.description: The final SSCC digit must satisfy the GS1 mod-10 check digit algorithm.

messages.pass: All decoded SSCC barcodes have valid mod-10 check digits.
messages.fail: One or more decoded SSCC values failed the mod-10 check digit.

rules.title: Embedded product/service checks suppressed
rules.description: SSCC numbering cannot embed product or service codes, so those barcode-level checks do not apply. Delivery conditions come from the electronic order data.

messages.pass: SSCC label: product and service codes are validated from order data, not the barcode.
